lead.reason: Codex reads AGENTS.md and can act as lead in the primary session; no generated file inference is required.

analyst.reason: Codex can execute analyst work from canonical role instructions in the primary session.

architect.reason: Codex can execute architect/spec work from canonical role instructions in the primary session.

dev.reason: Codex can implement code directly under AGENTS.md rules in the primary session.

qa.reason: Codex can run tests and perform QA review directly in the primary session.

docs.reason: Codex can update documentation directly in the primary session.

maintainer.reason: Codex can update memory and perform maintainer closeout in the primary session.

designer.reason: Codex has no verified provider-native designer subagent dispatch path in this harness.

notes: Thin provider adapter for Codex. Dispatcher manifest execution is a later slice; current hardcoded dispatcher behavior remains authoritative until then.
